productDisplayName: Puma Men's Commander White Black Shoe
description: A black shoe designed for those who never compromise on style and comfort, the puma Commander has a great Sports look making it an ideal choice to wear along with jeans and a t-shirt when you're relaxing at the weekend.  So comfortable you'll want to wear them every day.UpperSynthetic leather-look upper for durability, perforated at toe for breathabilityHigh-shine formstripe panel in navy on the sidesPadded collar plus fabric lining for sweat-free comfortLacing system for a snug, customised Fitpuma cat logo printed in gold on the side and back heel, branding tag on tongueMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleRubber outsole which reaches up around toe and heel for protection and styleHerringbone grooves and branding on outsole for optimal grip
